name: @brainana/ui
description: Shared, framework-free UI layer for brainana vis tools: the design-token theme (theme.css + self-hosted fonts), the h() DOM helper, and generic components (colorbar, slider, range control, legend). No domain knowledge.
//exports: Subpaths resolve to raw source (.ts / .css / .woff2). theme.css is the single source of design tokens — import it before any app stylesheet.
